news.paragraph: No fresh ticker-specific news available for EWY this build (Yahoo returned nothing readable, or every article was paywalled). Falling back to sector + macro context: EWY is classified as ETF. Macro backdrop: 10Y Treasury yield at 4.59% (+2.80% over 5d, rising), DXY at 99.19 (-0.08% over 5d, flat) — see the Bonds & USD tab for how this typically translates to this sector. Treat this take as market context, not a name-specific catalyst.

examples.body: $EWY $SPY Koreans bought the nanodip b/c the always do long more Korea
$KORU $EWY $SSNLF $SPY South Koreans are cancelling life insurance policies at a loss to buy stocks at the top.. chasing stocks like SK Hynix and Samsung.
